about.title: About
about.bio: I'm a hybrid professional in digital marketing and graphic design/UX-UI, with over 6 years of experience managing digital campaigns, analyzing KPIs, handling budgets, and creating visual content. I'm passionate about building solid visual identities and developing digital strategies with real impact. I've also embraced AI tools like Claude Code, integrating them naturally into my workflow to be more agile and creative in every project.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'm available for freelance projects and collaborations.
